## 2024-05-30 - [Object URL Memory Management in React]
**Learning:** Object URLs generated by `URL.createObjectURL` are not garbage collected automatically in SPAs like React. If left unmanaged, generating many large images (like from AI pipelines) causes significant memory leaks, slowing down or crashing the browser.
**Action:** Always wrap Object URLs generated from blobs in a `useEffect` cleanup hook that calls `URL.revokeObjectURL` whenever the variable is replaced or the component unmounts.
